schema.description: A server for interacting with Hacker News data, providing capabilities to search content, retrieve categorized stories, fetch story details with comments, and access user profiles and submissions.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for stories and comments on Hacker News using Algolia's search API. Use this tool when you need to search by keywords or specific terms.

query.description: The search query containing keywords to search for in Hacker News stories and comments.

content_type.description: Filter results by content type. Valid values are 'story' or 'comment'.

page.description: Page number for pagination when retrieving search results.

hits_per_page.description: Number of results to return per page (maximum 100).

hits.description: List of search results matching the query.

story_id.description: The unique identifier of the Hacker News story.

url.description: The URL link to the story's external content.

author.description: The username of the user who submitted the story.

points.description: The score of the story based on upvotes.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the story was submitted.

tools.name: getStories
tools.description: Get multiple stories by category type without searching. Use this tool to fetch pre-categorized story lists such as top, new, best, ask, show, or job stories.

story_type.description: The category of stories to fetch. Valid values are 'top', 'new', 'best', 'ask', 'show', or 'job'.

stories.description: List of stories in the requested category.

story_id.description: The unique identifier of the Hacker News story.

url.description: The URL link to the story's external content.

author.description: The username of the user who submitted the story.

points.description: The score of the story based on upvotes.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the story was submitted.

tools.name: getStoryWithComments
tools.description: Get a story along with its comment thread. Retrieves full story details and associated comments with configurable depth and count limits.

story_id.description: The unique identifier of the Hacker News story.

max_depth.description: Maximum depth of the comment tree to retrieve for nested replies.

max_comments.description: Maximum number of comments to return.

story_id.description: The unique identifier of the Hacker News story.

url.description: The URL link to the story's external content.

author.description: The username of the user who submitted the story.

points.description: The score of the story based on upvotes.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the story was submitted.

comments.description: List of comments associated with the story.

comment_id.description: The unique identifier of the comment.

author.description: The username of the user who wrote the comment.

text.description: The text content of the comment.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the comment was posted.

tools.name: getUser
tools.description: Get a user's profile information including karma, account creation date, and bio.

user_id.description: The username (user ID) of the Hacker News user.
The username (user ID) of the Hacker News user.

karma.description: The user's karma points, a reputation score based on upvotes received on submissions and comments.

created.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

about.description: The user's self-written bio or about section.

tools.name: getUserSubmissions
tools.description: Get a user's submissions including both stories and comments they have posted.

user_id.description: The username (user ID) of the Hacker News user.

submissions.description: List of submissions (stories and comments) by the user.

story_id.description: The unique identifier of the submission (story_id for stories, comment_id for comments).

submission_type.description: The type of submission, either 'story' or 'comment'.

title.description: The title of the submission (applicable for stories).

url.description: The URL link to the submission's external content.

points.description: The score of the submission based on upvotes.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the submission was posted.

scenarios.description: Basic scenario with one story, one comment, and one user
